SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER LEE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CHUNG JEEN GEE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IN & OUT MOVERS & STORAGE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FRANCISCO CASTILLO, OWNER. THE SECRETARY OF STATE (SOS) WEBSITE SHOWS THAT THE DEFENDANT IS FTB SUSPENDED. MR. CASTILLO STATES THAT IS AN ERROR. THE COURT GRANTS A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO CLARIFY THAT IN & OUT MOVERS AND STORAGE LLC IS NOT FTB SUSPENDED WITH THE SECRETARY OF STATE IN ORDER TO BE HEARD AT THE NEXT HEARING. THE COURT ALLOWS MS. LEE TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF CHUNG JEEN GEE, MOTHER. THE COURT ALLOWS MS. LEE TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF CHUNG JEEN GEE, MOTHER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
